# Alessandro Bonanno

URL: https://alessandro-bonanno.vercel.app/
Language: en
Primary topics: AI agents, agentic AI, machine learning, multi-agent systems, LLM applications, AI product management, AI automation, product presentation

## Summary
Alessandro Bonanno is an AI product builder and Information Systems student at the Technical University of Munich. He builds fast AI prototypes, AI agents, machine-learning workflows, and hackathon products with a focus on clear technical delivery and AI product presentation.

## Relevant projects
- StealthDetection: Machine learning model for energy-theft detection in smart-meter data with anomaly scoring and an operator investigation interface.
- traqr.ai: VC signal collection tool combining Supabase, X/Twitter, GitHub, LinkedIn, and alert data to map founder networks and surface early traction signals.
- SolarPingu: Autonomous solar sales agent system using Featherless AI and Qwen vision models for lead discovery, roof evaluation, qualification, and follow-up routing.
- NUMI: AI sales call intelligence product using ElevenLabs for call capture, transcription, behavior scoring, and CRM-ready feedback.
- Ivy Reply: Agentic sales workflow assistant built for getivy, today Augustus, a Peter Thiel-backed company.
- TalentFlow Advisor: Career and talent advisor prototype built for metafinanz, an Allianz company, for AI-assisted discovery, matching, and recommendation flows.

## Links
- Portfolio: https://alessandro-bonanno.vercel.app/
- GitHub: https://github.com/Alebabo
